name: Fudge-Nut Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and brown sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
3. Combine oats, flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
4. Spread 2/3 of the mixture in an ungreased 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
5. Prepare filling by heating milk, chocolate chips, butter, and salt until melted.
6. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla and walnuts.
7. Spread filling over oat mixture in the pan.
8. Drop remaining oat mixture by tablespoonfuls over the chocolate.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes.
